name: Carnivore Beef Tenderloin Breakfast Plate
instructions: Season steak with salt and pepper; sear in a hot dry skillet 3 minutes per side. Remove and rest. In same pan fry eggs and bacon until cooked. Plate steak slices alongside eggs and bacon.

name: Carnivore Lamb Egg Skillet
instructions: Brown ground beef and lamb chop in a dry skillet over high heat. Push meat aside and fry eggs in rendered fat. Season with salt and pepper; serve together.

name: Carnivore Pork Bacon Egg Bowl
instructions: Cook pork chop in a cast iron pan, 4 minutes per side. Fry bacon until crisp. Scramble eggs in bacon fat. Slice pork and serve with bacon and eggs.

name: Carnivore Ground Beef Breakfast Patty Plate
instructions: Form beef into 2 patties, season with salt and pepper. Cook in a dry skillet 3 minutes per side for medium. Fry eggs alongside. Serve patties topped with eggs.

name: Carnivore Turkey Egg White Skillet
instructions: Slice turkey thin; cook in a hot skillet 2-3 minutes per side. Add broth and simmer 1 minute. Push turkey aside and scramble eggs in the same pan. Season and serve.

name: Carnivore Smoked Salmon Egg Plate
instructions: Scramble eggs with cream cheese in a non-stick pan over low heat until just set. Plate alongside smoked salmon slices and season with salt and pepper.

name: Carnivore Sirloin and Eggs Breakfast
instructions: Season sirloin generously with salt and pepper. Sear in a hot cast iron 3-4 minutes per side. Rest 3 minutes. Fry eggs in same pan. Slice steak and serve with eggs.

name: Carnivore Pork Chop and Eggs
instructions: Season pork chop with salt and pepper; cook in a hot pan 5 minutes per side. Whisk eggs with cream and scramble in the same pan over medium-low heat until just set.

name: Carnivore Shrimp and Egg Scramble
instructions: Cook shrimp in a dry pan 1-2 minutes per side until pink. Whisk eggs with cream and pour over shrimp. Scramble gently until set. Season and serve immediately.

name: Carnivore Cod Egg Breakfast Bowl
instructions: Season cod with salt and pepper; pan-sear 3-4 minutes per side until flaky. In a separate pan, fry eggs sunny-side up. Flake cod into a bowl and top with eggs.

name: Carnivore Ground Turkey Egg Bake
instructions: Brown ground turkey in an oven-safe skillet. Spread evenly, make 4 wells, and crack an egg in each. Top with shredded cheddar. Bake at 375°F for 12-15 minutes until eggs are set.

name: Carnivore Halibut Egg Plate
instructions: Season halibut with salt and pepper; sear 4 minutes per side in a hot pan until cooked through. Fry eggs in the same pan. Serve halibut and eggs together.

name: Keto Spinach Feta Frittata
instructions: Whisk eggs with cream, salt, and crumbled feta. Heat olive oil in oven-safe skillet; wilt spinach 2 minutes. Pour egg mixture over. Cook on stovetop 3 minutes, then bake at 375°F for 10 minutes until set.

name: Keto Avocado Bacon Breakfast Bowl
instructions: Fry bacon until crisp; remove and crumble. Fry eggs in bacon fat. Slice avocado and season with salt. Arrange avocado, eggs, and crumbled bacon in a bowl.

name: Keto Cheddar Egg Muffins
instructions: Whisk eggs, cream, salt, and pepper. Fold in shredded cheese and chopped spinach. Pour into greased muffin tin. Bake at 350°F for 18-20 minutes until puffed and golden.

name: Keto Salmon Cream Cheese Breakfast
instructions: Slice cucumber into rounds. Spread cream cheese on each slice. Top with smoked salmon and sliced avocado. Season with salt and pepper.

name: Keto Almond Flour Breakfast Muffins
instructions: Mix almond flour, cinnamon, and salt. In a separate bowl whisk eggs, melted coconut oil, and vanilla. Combine wet and dry ingredients. Pour into muffin tin and bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.

name: Keto Mushroom Egg Scramble
instructions: Sauté sliced mushrooms in olive oil over high heat until golden, 5 minutes. Whisk eggs with cream and pour over mushrooms. Scramble gently over medium-low heat. Finish with grated parmesan.

name: Keto Cauliflower Hash and Eggs
instructions: Pulse cauliflower in food processor to rice-size. Sauté onion in olive oil 3 minutes; add cauliflower and cook 8 minutes until golden. Make wells and crack in eggs. Cover and cook until eggs set. Top with cheese.

name: Keto Zucchini Egg Bake
instructions: Grate zucchini and squeeze dry. Sauté in olive oil with Italian seasoning 5 minutes. Spread in baking dish, top with beaten eggs and mozzarella. Bake at 375°F for 15 minutes until set.

name: Keto Beef Breakfast Skillet
instructions: Brown ground beef in a skillet with diced peppers. Drain excess fat. Create 2 wells, crack in eggs, and cover until whites are set. Top with shredded cheddar and serve.

name: Keto Cottage Cheese Egg Scramble
instructions: Beat eggs with cottage cheese. Heat olive oil in a pan; wilt spinach 1 minute. Pour egg mixture over and scramble gently over medium-low heat until just set. Season and serve.

name: Vegan Tempeh Breakfast Skillet
instructions: Crumble tempeh into a hot oiled pan. Add diced onion and pepper; cook 4 minutes. Add spinach, soy sauce, and cumin; stir until wilted. Serve hot.

name: Vegan Berry Chia Overnight Bowl
instructions: Mix chia seeds, coconut milk, vanilla, and maple syrup. Refrigerate overnight. In the morning, top with fresh berries and serve cold.

name: Vegan Savory Oat Bowl with Spinach
instructions: Cook oats in water. Wilt spinach in olive oil 1 minute. Top oats with wilted spinach, drizzle with olive oil, and stir in nutritional yeast. Season with salt and pepper.

name: Vegan Hemp Seed Protein Smoothie
instructions: Blend hemp seeds, banana, blueberries, plant protein, and coconut milk until smooth. Pour into glass and top with chia seeds.

name: Vegan Almond Banana Protein Pancakes
instructions: Mash banana; mix with almond flour, ground flax, coconut milk, and cinnamon to form batter. Cook spoonfuls in coconut oil over medium heat 2-3 minutes per side until golden.

name: Vegan Tofu Veggie Breakfast Wrap
instructions: Crumble and cook tofu in olive oil with cumin until golden. Warm tortilla, fill with tofu scramble, spinach, peppers, and salsa. Roll and serve.

name: Vegan Black Bean Breakfast Bowl
instructions: Warm black beans with cumin and olive oil in a small pan. Place over fresh spinach. Top with diced tomato, sliced avocado, and a squeeze of lemon juice.

name: Vegan Coconut Oatmeal with Mango
instructions: Cook oats in coconut milk over medium heat 5 minutes, stirring until creamy. Sweeten with maple syrup. Top with diced mango and chia seeds and a pinch of cinnamon.

name: Vegan Flaxseed Blueberry Smoothie Bowl
instructions: Blend blueberries, banana, flaxseed, protein powder, and coconut milk until thick. Pour into a bowl and top with hemp seeds.

name: Vegan Edamame Spinach Quinoa Bowl
instructions: Layer warm quinoa in a bowl. Top with edamame, fresh spinach, and sliced avocado. Drizzle with sesame oil and soy sauce. Toss gently and serve.

name: Paleo Egg and Sweet Potato Hash
instructions: Dice sweet potato and microwave 3 minutes to par-cook. Sauté onion and pepper in olive oil 3 minutes; add sweet potato and paprika, cook 5 minutes. Make wells and crack eggs in. Cover until eggs are set.

name: Paleo Salmon Avocado Breakfast Bowl
instructions: Season salmon with salt and sear skin-side down 4 minutes; flip and cook 2 more minutes. Flake over a bed of greens. Add sliced avocado and drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice.

name: Paleo Almond Butter Banana Bowl
instructions: Slice banana into a bowl. Drizzle with almond butter and coconut milk. Top with blueberries, chia seeds, and cinnamon. Serve immediately.

name: Paleo Turkey Veggie Scramble
instructions: Brown ground turkey in olive oil with onions 5 minutes. Add spinach and cook 1 minute. Crack eggs over and scramble into the turkey mixture until cooked. Season with salt.

name: Paleo Coconut Mango Smoothie Bowl
instructions: Blend mango, banana, and coconut milk until thick and smooth. Pour into bowl. Top with diced pineapple, hemp seeds, and chia seeds.

name: Paleo Beef Veggie Breakfast Hash
instructions: Microwave diced sweet potato 2 minutes. Brown beef in olive oil with onion 4 minutes. Add sweet potato and kale; cook 3 more minutes until kale is wilted. Season and serve.

name: Paleo Bacon Butternut Squash Hash
instructions: Dice butternut squash; roast at 400°F for 20 minutes. Cook bacon and onion in a skillet until crisp. Add roasted squash and rosemary. Make wells and cook eggs to desired doneness.

name: Paleo Smoked Salmon Avocado Plate
instructions: Arrange smoked salmon on a plate. Fan sliced avocado alongside. Add cucumber rounds. Drizzle everything with olive oil and lemon juice. Season with sea salt.

name: Paleo Egg and Asparagus Plate
instructions: Toss asparagus in olive oil, salt, and pepper; roast at 425°F for 10 minutes until tender. Poach or fry eggs. Arrange asparagus on plate topped with eggs; drizzle with lemon.

name: Paleo Almond Coconut Breakfast Bowl
instructions: Soak chia seeds in coconut milk overnight. Stir and pour into bowl. Top with sliced banana, strawberries, almonds, and cinnamon.

name: Pescatarian Tuna Avocado Breakfast Bowl
instructions: Fry or poach eggs. Place greens in bowl; top with tuna and sliced avocado. Add eggs. Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice. Season with salt.

name: Pescatarian Shrimp Egg Scramble
instructions: Cook shrimp in olive oil with garlic 2 minutes per side. Add spinach and wilt. Pour in beaten eggs and scramble until just set. Season and serve.

name: Pescatarian Salmon Oat Bowl
instructions: Cook oats with water. Season salmon with salt; pan-sear 3 minutes per side. Flake salmon over oats. Add sliced avocado, drizzle with olive oil and lemon.

name: Pescatarian Cod Egg White Omelette
instructions: Flake cooked cod (poach 5 minutes in water). Beat eggs and pour into oiled pan; cook omelette base 2 minutes. Add spinach and cod, fold and finish cooking 1 more minute.

name: Pescatarian Mahi Mahi Breakfast Plate
instructions: Season mahi mahi with salt; sear in olive oil 4 minutes per side. Fry eggs alongside. Plate with sliced avocado and drizzle lemon juice over fish.

name: Pescatarian Tilapia Veggie Scramble
instructions: Flake cooked tilapia (bake at 375°F for 12 minutes). Sauté peppers in olive oil 2 minutes; add spinach and wilt. Add tilapia and beaten eggs; scramble together until set.

name: Smoked Salmon Cucumber Breakfast Plate
instructions: Slice cucumber into thick rounds. Spread cream cheese on each. Drape smoked salmon over top. Squeeze lemon, season with pepper and sea salt, and serve chilled.

name: Mediterranean Olive Omelette
instructions: Beat eggs. Heat olive oil in a non-stick pan. Pour in eggs and cook until nearly set. Add spinach, cherry tomatoes, and feta. Fold omelette and finish cooking 1 minute.

name: Mediterranean Feta Tomato Scramble
instructions: Dice tomatoes and cook in olive oil with Italian seasoning 2 minutes. Beat eggs and pour over tomatoes; scramble gently. Finish with crumbled feta just before serving.

name: Mediterranean Yogurt Fruit Bowl
instructions: Spoon yogurt into bowl. Arrange strawberries and blueberries on top. Scatter walnuts, drizzle with honey, and dust with cinnamon.

name: Mediterranean Shakshuka Style Eggs
instructions: Sauté onion and pepper in olive oil 4 minutes. Add diced tomatoes, cumin, paprika, and salt; simmer 8 minutes. Make wells, crack in eggs, cover, and cook 6 minutes until whites are set.

name: Mediterranean Chickpea Breakfast Bowl
instructions: Warm chickpeas in olive oil with cumin 3 minutes. Add cherry tomatoes; cook 2 minutes. Plate over fresh spinach. Drizzle with lemon juice.

name: Mediterranean Avocado Egg Toast
instructions: Toast bread. Mash avocado with salt and spread on toast. Poach eggs in simmering water 3 minutes. Top toast with poached eggs and cherry tomatoes. Drizzle with olive oil.
